perks.description:
Boosts ATK by 10%–20% and combo finisher DMG Cap by
5%–20% based on Adept Arts Lvl. At Arts Lvl IV, the
captain's skill cooldowns shorten by 10%.
Adept Arts Lvl always starts at Lvl II.

At Arts Lvl IV, the captain gains DMG Cap +100%, and landing
Power Raise ++ extends Arts Lvl duration by 50%. In exchange,
taking 50000 or more damage from a single attack resets
Arts Lvl to Lvl II.

Upon casting a healing skill, gain a lvl of Combat Healer ◆.
While in effect, it grants ATK +10% and DMG Cap +20%.

Revive now rescues allies anywhere on the battlefield and
grants ATK↑ (15%) ◆ and DMG Cap↑ (10%) ◆ to the entire
party. In exchange, the captain's skill cooldowns extend
by 10%.

Combat Healer's ◆ max lvl is now 3.
At lvl 2 and above, it grants ATK +15% and DMG Cap +30%
per effect lvl. Upon casting a healing skill, the captain's
other skill cooldowns shorten by 10%.

Whenever the captain takes damage in place of an ally with
the Substitute ◆ effect, the captain gains a permanent lvl
of Charisma ◆ (max lvl 5). While in effect, it grants
DEF +1% per effect lvl.

Phalanx now grants Substitute ◆. Charisma's ◆ max lvl is
now 10, and it also grants DMG Dealt +5% per effect lvl.
In addition, at lvl 10, gaining another lvl of Charisma
grants Supplementary DMG (20%) ◆.

Shortens Substitute's skill cooldown by 50%. In exchange,
its effect duration is also shortened by 20%.
Whenever the captain takes damage in place of an ally with
the Substitute ◆ effect, the captain's skill cooldowns
shorten by 10%.

perks.description:
While Ares is summoned, damage skills gain ATK +10% and
DMG Cap +20%.

Once summoned, for 10 sec., Ares won't be dismissed from
using Pactstrikes or skills. Landing the following skills
extends Ares's duration.
Enchanted Lands: +2 sec.
Winter's Rain: +2 sec.
Frozen Blade: +1 sec.

Landing combo finishers extends Ares's time with Katalina by
1 sec., while landing link attacks extends it by 1 sec.
For every 15 sec. Ares remains summoned, Katalina gains a
lvl of Dual Raid ◆ (max lvl 5). While in effect, it grants
DMG Dealt +5% per effect lvl but ends when Ares is dismissed.
While Ares is summoned, Unique Attacks gain ATK +10% and DMG Cap +20%.

Combo E now deals special Supplementary DMG (20%).
When the Ares gauge is full, or upon activating Azure Sword,
Katalina gains 3 charges of Ares Surge (◆). While in effect,
the Ares gauge won't deplete, but if Ares Pactstrike is
performed during a combo, 1 charge is consumed.
When charges reach 0, Ares is dismissed.

Landing damage skills now fills the Ares gauge. At 3 charges
of Ares Surge (◆), Katalina gains DMG Dealt +15%, and each
charge consumed grants an additional DMG Dealt +25%.
Activating and completing Ares Pactstrike enables a follow-up
Pactstrike, extending the combo; completed Pactstrikes consume
1 charge. If the combo ends, any remaining charges are removed.

All party members buffed by Light Wall gain a lvl of
Blade Blue ◆. While in effect, it grants ATK +5% and
DMG Cap +10%.

Blade Blue's ◆ max lvl is now 3. At lvl 2 and above, it
grants ATK +5% and DMG Cap +20% per effect lvl.
In addition, all party members affected by Heal also gain
a lvl of Blade Blue ◆.

All party members buffed by Emerald Shield gain
Supplementary DMG (30%) ◆.
Whenever Katalina deals Supplementary DMG from this effect,
she has a 5% chance to gain a lvl of Blade Blue ◆.

perks.description: Landing Normal Attacks on weak points or from behind boosts Heat Gauge Gain by 10%.

Landing damage skills or link attacks boosts Heat Gauge Gain
by 20% and grants Super Bull's Eye Blast ◆.
This effect grants ATK +30% and DMG Dealt +50% to the
next Bull's Eye Blast and is consumed on activation.

Boosts Bull's Eye Blast's charge speed by 20%.
Landing a Bull's Eye Blast while buffed by
Super Bull's Eye Blast ◆ grants a 25% chance to reset all
of Rackam's skill cooldowns.
Normal Attacks gain a max of ATK +20% based on Heat gauge level. Each Normal Attack has a 5% chance to shorten all of Rackam's skill cooldowns by 5%

Coffinmaker gains a max of ATK +30% and DMG Cap +100% based
on Heat gauge level, but the Heat gauge fills 20% slower.

When held, Coffinmaker now fires continuously as long as the
Heat gauge isn't empty. In exchange, the gauge depletes much
faster, and the skill can no longer be activated while on
cooldown. When Coffinmaker is interrupted, it goes on
cooldown. Landing Bull's Eye Blast V shortens Coffinmaker's
cooldown by 30%.

Collateral Damage gains DMG Dealt +10%.
Taking damage from the resulting explosion leaves Rackam
with 5% HP. If he already had less than 5% HP, he's left
with 1 HP instead.

Collateral Damage now gains DMG Dealt +20%.
Landing Collateral Damage shortens its cooldown by 80%.
Rackam loses the ability to dodge right after and can only
avoid the explosion using Duration.

Collateral Damage now gains DMG Dealt +30%.
Landing Collateral Damage grants Shield (50000) to Rackam.

takes no damage.

Whenever Fediel lands Miasma Hands, she gains a lvl of
Enhanced Combo Finishers ◆ (max lvl 10). While in effect,
it grants DMG Dealt +1% per effect lvl to combo finishers.
Performing a combo finisher removes the effect.
Repeatedly pressing Unique Attacks after a combo finisher unleashes up to 5 more magic orbs.

Extends the effect durations of the following skills:
The Black's Blessing: Duration +10%
Primordial Fear: Duration +10%
Miasmic Abyss: Duration +5%

Whenever Fediel lands a swipe of Miasma Hands,
Miasmic Abyss's cooldown shortens by 7%.

Whenever Fediel lands Miasma Hands against foes inside
Miasmic Abyss's AoE, it triggers Bonus AoE DMG (70% of DMG
dealt by Miasmic Abyss).
Fediel's damage skills gain DMG Cap +10%.

Whenever Fediel lands a combo finisher, she gains
Skill DMG↑ ◆. While in effect, it grants Skill ATK +10%
and Skill DMG Cap +30%.

Whenever Fediel lands a swipe of Miasma Hands, she gains
a lvl of Malice ◆ (max lvl 10). While in effect, her skill
cooldowns shorten based on effect lvl.
If Miasma Hands is interrupted, Malice ◆ is removed.
